title: Tesla Model S Plaid
description: The Tesla Model S Plaid is a high-performance luxury electric sedan featuring a 1,020-horsepower tri-motor all-wheel-drive system, delivering 0–60 mph acceleration in 1.99 seconds. It boasts a 200 mph top speed, ~368-mile EPA range, and features a minimalist interior with a yoke steering wheel, 17-inch display, and advanced tech, setting it as a top-tier EV.
